mapper.sql: id, milestone_days, reward_points, reward_title, badge_code, description, enabled, created_at, updated_at, version
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sign_in_cumulative_reward_config WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM sign_in_cumulative_reward_config WHERE enabled = 1 AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY milestone_days ASC
SELECT FROM sign_in_cumulative_reward_config WHERE deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY milestone_days ASC
SELECT FROM sign_in_cumulative_reward_config WHERE enabled = 1 AND deleted_at IS NULL AND milestone_days <= #{days} ORDER BY milestone_days ASC
SELECT FROM sign_in_cumulative_reward_config WHERE milestone_days = #{milestoneDays} AND deleted_at IS NOT NULL LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE sign_in_cumulative_reward_config SET milestone_days = #{milestoneDays}, reward_points = #{rewardPoints}, reward_title = #{rewardTitle}, badge_code = #{badgeCode}, description = #{description}, enabled = #{enabled}, version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND version = #{version} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sign_in_cumulative_reward_config (milestone_days, reward_points, reward_title, badge_code, description, enabled) VALUES (#{milestoneDays}, #{rewardPoints}, #{rewardTitle}, #{badgeCode}, #{description}, #{enabled})
mapper.update: UPDATE sign_in_cumulative_reward_config SET milestone_days = #{milestoneDays}, reward_points = #{rewardPoints}, reward_title = #{rewardTitle}, badge_code = #{badgeCode}, description = #{description}, enabled = #{enabled}, deleted_at = NULL, version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND version = #{version} AND deleted_at IS NOT NULL
